face.structure: angular with a defined jawline, prominent cheekbones, and a slight hint of youthfulness

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with an upward tilt
eyes.color: dark brown with flecks of gold
details: high contrast between iris and sclera

face.expression: a reserved smile that conveys cautious friendliness

skin.texture: smooth with a hint of natural sheen
skin.rendering_notes: light reflects softly, emphasizing natural contours

hair.style: slightly tousled medium length with an undercut
hair.flow: gently swaying to the side, accentuating the undercut
details: occasional flyaways indicating a casual styling

character.aura: an enigmatic presence amplified by an analytical demeanor

outfit.base: sleek casual attire suited for smart occasions
outfit.design: a fitted charcoal-grey turtleneck paired with a tailored black blazer
details: subtle pinstripe pattern on the blazer

composition.pose: standing with weight shifted slightly to one hip
composition.gesture: right hand casually touching the chin in a thoughtful pose

background.color_palette: muted greys and blues with occasional warm light accents
background.details: blurred cityscape with hints of bustling activity in soft focus, capturing a sense of engagement and movement
background.rules: background should not distract from the character's silhouette
